introSection: Cobra is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Conny-Land in Lipperswil, Thurgau, Switzerland. It was built by Pax Company with the current train provided by Sunkid Heege GmbH.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a vertical loop followed by the world's only scorpion tail element.

fullText:
Cobra is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Conny-Land in Lipperswil, Thurgau, Switzerland. It was built by Pax Company with the current train provided by Sunkid Heege GmbH.

The ride has a vertical loop followed by the world's only scorpion tail element.
